source.page_label: Waterfowl Season Dates, Rules & Regulations | AGFC
source.update_note: 2026-27 migratory bird data from AGFC waterfowl regulations and Greenhead Magazine (April 2026 Commission meeting). Arkansas is in the Mississippi Flyway.

species.name: Canada Goose
species.season_raw: Early: Sep 1-Oct 15; Regular: same as duck segments

species.name: White-fronted Goose
species.season_raw: Oct 31-Nov 8, then same as duck segments through Jan 31

species.name: Snow, Blue & Ross's Goose
species.season_raw: Oct 31-Nov 8, then same as duck segments through Jan 31

key_notes.title: HIP Registration is required for all migratory bird hunters age 16+ hunting ducks, geese, doves, coots, woodcock, snipe, rails, or gallinules. Complete when purchasing license.

sources.label: AGFC — Waterfowl Regulations
sources.evidence: HIP Registration: Required for all migratory bird hunters (age 16+) hunting ducks, geese, doves, coots, woodcock, snipe, rails, or gallinules. Complete when purchasing license at AGFC office or online.

key_notes.title: The Arkansas Waterfowl Stamp ($7 resident / $50 nonresident) is required for all waterfowl hunters, in addition to the Federal Duck Stamp ($25).

sources.label: AGFC — License Descriptions and Fees
sources.evidence: Arkansas Waterfowl Stamp: $7 resident, $50 nonresident. Required for all waterfowl hunters.

key_notes.title: Duck species restrictions: 4 mallards max (2 hens), 1 scaup, 3 wood ducks, 3 pintails, 2 redheads, 2 canvasbacks, 2 black ducks, 1 mottled duck.

sources.label: AGFC — Duck Season Regulations
sources.evidence: Duck daily bag: 6 total with species restrictions — 4 mallards max (2 hen mallards), 1 scaup, 3 wood ducks, 3 pintails, 2 redheads, 2 canvasbacks, 2 black ducks, 1 mottled duck.

key_notes.title: Shooting hours on WMAs during regular duck season end at noon (except last day: sunrise to sunset). Early teal shooting hours begin at sunrise (no pre-sunrise shooting).

sources.label: AGFC — Waterfowl Shooting Hours
sources.evidence: Regular duck season (on WMAs): Shooting from 30 min before sunrise to noon (except last day of regular season: sunrise to sunset). Special Early Teal Season: Shooting hours begin at sunrise (no pre-sunrise).
